run run-test  workflow task
  ok                  task/implement  2s  branch=work/x  pr=17
  ok                  task/merge  2s  merged=yes
  ok                  task/review  chose=task/review-cycle@2/review  verdict=approved
  ok                  task/review-cycle@1/fix  2s  status=pushed
  ok                  task/review-cycle@1/review  2s  verdict=changes
  skipped-condition   task/review-cycle@2/fix
  ok                  task/review-cycle@2/review  2s  verdict=approved
  skipped-condition   task/review-cycle@3/fix
  skipped-condition   task/review-cycle@3/review
totals: 6 ok, 0 failed, 3 skipped (condition), 0 skipped (dependency); wall 2s
journal: runs/run-test/journal.jsonl
